description_long: This is a cylindrical cup with a deep red exterior, featuring prominent white text and a graphic of a steaming cup of hot chocolate with marshmallows. The cup has a brown, opaque lid that fits snugly on top, suggesting it is designed for containing hot beverages. The surface is adorned with various labels, including nutritional facts, preparation instructions, and playful branding elements, giving it a commercial, store-bought appearance. The main label reads 'Hot Chocolate' in a yellow patch, and the rest of the cup is covered with detailed product information and whimsical warnings. The cup appears to be made primarily of coated paper or thin plastic, typical of disposable hot drink containers. Its overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible handle.
description: A red, cylindrical cup with a brown lid, white branding text, and a hot chocolate graphic, resembling a disposable beverage container. The surface is smooth and glossy, covered with product information and playful labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main 'Hot Chocolate' label, white branding text, and a graphic of a steaming cup with marshmallows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the continuation of the branding text and the start of the nutritional facts and preparation instructions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full nutritional facts, preparation instructions, and additional product warnings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more product information, including ingredients and whimsical warnings, with less branding text visible.
